app.name: n8n
app.one_liner: A fair-code, self-hostable workflow automation platform that blends visual no-code design with custom JavaScript/Python execution and native AI capabilities via LangChain.

screens.name: Workflow Editor
screens.purpose: Visual canvas for designing and orchestrating multi-step automations using drag-and-drop nodes and configuration panels.

rust_commands.name: execute_workflow
rust_commands.purpose: Trigger execution of a saved workflow with provided input data and return execution results.

rust_commands.name: save_workflow
rust_commands.purpose: Persist the current workflow definition to storage, including node configurations, connections, and credentials reference.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build minimal UI for node placement and connection
week 1: Set up core workflow execution engine
acceptance_tests: Saved workflow can be reloaded and executed with expected output based on mock integrations.
User can create a new workflow, add at least two connected nodes, configure credentials, and save it successfully.
